description_long: This is a pair of sporty, rectangular sunglasses with a robust, full-rim frame and slightly curved temples for a secure fit. The frame is predominantly black, featuring bold, colorful branding and graphic elements on the temples, including the word 'TAIWAN' in blue and red. The lenses have a striking reddish-pink tint with a mirrored finish, providing both style and sun protection. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that smoothly connects the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples are thick and straight, with a slight outward curve at the ends for comfort behind the ears. Overall, the design is modern and dynamic, suitable for active urban environments.
description: Sporty black sunglasses with mirrored reddish-pink lenses and bold blue-red branding on the temples. The frame is full-rimmed and robust, with thick, straight arms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular, mirrored reddish-pink lenses and the solid, full-rim black frame.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thick temple with prominent blue and red 'TAIWAN' branding and graphic detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside curvature of the temples and the continuous, integrated bridge design.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the matching 'TAIWAN' branding and graphics on the temple, as well as the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples that curve slightly outward at the ends. The frame is robust and sporty, with a continuous bridge and no visible nose pads.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses have a mirrored reddish-pink tint, providing a reflective and stylish appearance with moderate transparency.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated, straight bridge that smoothly connects the two lenses without any separation or visible nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with bold, printed blue and red 'TAIWAN' branding and additional white graphic elements, adding a dynamic and sporty flair.
attribute_brand_logo: A printed 'TAIWAN' logo is visible on both temples, rendered in blue and red with a white outline.
